rule_metadata.name: wetransfer
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'wetransfer' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule wetransfer
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'wetransfer' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "wetransfer"
		rule_category = "greyware_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /https\:\/\/we\.tl\/t\-/ nocase ascii wide
		$string2 = /https\:\/\/wetransfer\.com\/api\/v4\/transfers\// nocase ascii wide
		$string3 = /https\:\/\/wetransfer\.com\/downloads\// nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
